1.name: Otherworldly Patron
1.description: Choose your patron: The Archfey, The Fiend, The Great Old One, The Celestial, The Hexblade, The Fathomless, The Genie, The Undead, or others.

1.name: Pact Magic
1.description: Cast warlock spells using Charisma. Pact magic slots are all the same level (scales 1st→5th) and recharge on short or long rest. Know a fixed number of spells.

2.name: Eldritch Invocations
2.description: Learn two invocations from the warlock list. Gain more invocations as you level. Customize your abilities, cantrips, and spell access.

3.name: Pact Boon
3.description: Choose: Pact of the Chain (familiar), Pact of the Blade (weapon), Pact of the Tome (book of shadows), or Pact of the Talisman.

11.name: Mystic Arcanum
11.description: Choose one 6th-level spell. Cast it once per long rest without a spell slot. Gain 7th, 8th, and 9th level Arcanum at levels 13, 15, 17.

20.name: Eldritch Master
20.description: Once per long rest, spend 1 minute entreating your patron to regain all expended Pact Magic spell slots.
